subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-12-14 in Liverpool
subcodes.first_line: The foundation of these [Azalis] is chaos and confusion.  From this act which their very leader committed, one can discern the conduct of the others in their ranks
subcodes.first_line_orig: اساس اینها بر هرج و مرجست از این عمل رئیس اعمال باقی را بفهمید
subcodes.subjects: @East and West; communication between East and West, @growth of the Cause, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
